name: Ham, Egg and Cheese Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bread cubes in a greased 9 x 13 pan.
2. Pour the milk mixture over the bread cubes and refrigerate overnight.
3. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
4. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes, or until set.
5. Let sit for 10 to 15 minutes before serving.
6. Cut into squares. Serves 12 to 15.
